RULING- NO NOTICE WAS GIVEN BY PLAINTIFF TO THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
